title: Alec, Banished!
overview: Court magician Alec is banished by an angry prince.

title: Together Again
overview: Alec Ygret is invited to rejoin his former party

title: Deadly Battle! The 64th Floor Boss
overview: Alec heads into a dungeon for the first time since joining Lasting Period.

title: The True Floor Boss
overview: Can the adventurers of Lasting Period trust Loki's advice regarding the upcoming battle?

title: The Useless Man and the Bratty Kid
overview: Alec is forced to battle Regulus, who's left home to chase after him.

title: Alec and Yoruha
overview: Yorha shows Alec around the town that has become his new home as an adventurer.

title: Labyrinth
overview: Various elements converge on the Labyrinth dungeon. Will the band Lasting Period agree to go down there?

title: Scars
overview: The party goes deeper into the dungeon in pursuit of the Shadow Guild.

title: Burning Blood
overview: Ornest battles Gloria the Wrathful deep in the dungeon.

title: Blademaster
overview: The party begins its battle with the Blademaster at the bottom of the dungeon.

title: Beyond Limits
overview: Lasting Period pushes itself beyond the limits to battle the Blademaster.

title: Endless days (Lasting Period)
overview: With the Blademaster defeated, Lasting Period sets its sights on its next goal.
